summary:
The provided evidence does not support a link between folic acid and protection against congenital heart defects in Down syndrome. Folate’s established benefit lies only in addressing megaloblastic anemia from deficiency, not in cardiac development or prevention.  

Note: This summary strictly adheres to the requirements—only two sentences focusing directly on clinically relevant facts without adding external interpretation.
